content.speakerText: I’m so jealous—I’ve been wanting to hike for months!
content.speakerTextCn: 我好羡慕啊，我早就想徒步了！
expectedAnswers: You totally should! I’ve got a beginner trail map if you want.
Yeah, hiking is the best way to unwind—I can share my favorite trail with you.
That’s awesome! I just did a hike last weekend—want me to send you the route?
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了对方的情感（羡慕/渴望）并表达共鸣
是否使用了场景关键词如 'trail', 'map', 'hike' 或类似表达
是否将共鸣转化为具体行动建议（分享资源、提议计划）

expectedAnswers: Yeah, I’ll send you the map tonight. What time works for you?
Cool! I’ll bring water and snacks—we can make it a full day out.
Perfect! Let’s meet at 8 a.m. at the trailhead—I’ve got a map and a thermos of coffee!
evaluationCriteria: 是否确认并强化了对方的积极情绪
是否添加了具体计划细节（时间、物品、地点）
是否避免了空泛回应如 'Cool!' 或 'Nice!' 而未推进互动
